prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock LSA (6.2L LS-based supercharged V8, GM engine code LSA) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit featuring a 2.3L billet impeller, 10-rib serpentine drive system, and a custom heat exchanger with dual SPAL 16" fans for sustained 850whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing boost, ignition, and fueling via ID1000x injectors and a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump

Drivetrain: Install a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox with a PWR 4.11:1 LSD differential, uprated CV joints, and a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch assembly to handle the increased torque, paired with a custom 3.5" driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop

Suspension & Handling: Fit a full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit with 24-way compression/rebound damping, adjustable camber plates, and spherical bearing control arms from SuperPro, alongside a Whiteline 27mm front sway bar and a 24mm rear sway bar with adjustable end links for reduced body roll
estetica: Aero: Fit a full AP Racing carbon fiber widebody kit (HSV GTSR W1-inspired) with a 3-piece front splitter, side skirts, and a 200mm adjustable rear wing, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a 50mm heat extractor vent for the LSA supercharger

Wheels & Stance: Mount a set of 20x10.5" ET15 and 20x12" ET45 Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 315/30 rear), with a 30mm front and 20mm rear custom air suspension setup from Air Lift Performance for adjustable ride height

Interior: Replace the stock seats with a pair of Sparco Pro 2000 carbon fiber racing seats, a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries with bolt-in harness bars, and a Motec C127 dash logger with integrated GPS lap timing, all trimmed in Alcantara with HSV GTSR W1-spec red stitching
